notes:
44 cells (4 platforms × 11 sections). Present: 23, Partial: 5, Missing: 10, N/A: 6.

Key findings:

1. STRUCTURAL — All four quickstarts are missing a concrete 'Initialize the SDK' section. They all link out to /authentication instead. Single biggest content gap; recommend a single Tier B restructure task across all four, not four separate tasks.

2. ACCURATE-BY-OMISSION — DB encryption is Android-only at the SDK level. Verified empirically against AmitySDKIOS and Amity-Social-Cloud-SDK-Flutter-Internal source (no DBEncryption / dbEncryption symbols present). Marking iOS/Flutter/Web as n_a not missing. This kind of source-verified n/a is exactly why parity matrices must be SDK-grounded — naive flagging would have produced fabricated docs.

3. FLUTTER OUTLIER — flutter-quick-start.mdx is 80 lines vs Android's 346. Missing project configuration, SDK init, platform-specific notes, alternative install. Prioritise this page even if individual gaps are Tier B/C.

4. Generated two Tier A follow-ups (0004 accordion normalize, 0005 flutter install clarification). Both are blocked_by 0001 so they won't race with Copilot's frontmatter edits.

5. Deferred to human/PM (Tier C): best-practices IA decision (web has it, others don't — harmonize up or down?), Kotlin-coroutines-vs-RxJava guidance on Android.

6. The 'SDK init missing across all four' finding is Tier B and would benefit from sdk-surface/ being populated first so the generated init snippets are accuracy-verifiable. Recommend deferring that follow-up task until typescript.json / android.json / ios.json / flutter.json land in sdk-surface/.
